findings.section: Description / What to do / Acceptance Criteria / Details / Post-completion
findings.issue: Task body is written in Russian. According to project conventions (CLAUDE.md), tech docs should be in English. Tasks 6, 7, 8 are fully in English; Task 9 is the outlier. This creates inconsistency and may cause issues with English-language skills that parse task content.
findings.fix: Translate all prose sections to English. AC checklist items can reference Russian user-spec text as quoted strings, but the surrounding task text should be English.

findings.issue: The '## Reviewers' section is absent. The task template requires this section to be present for all tasks. For audit tasks with reviewers=[], the section should be present but empty or state 'None — self-verifying audit task'.
findings.fix: Add '## Reviewers' section with a note such as: 'None — self-verifying audit task. See logs/working/task-6/code-audit.md for output artifact.'

findings.issue: The '## Reviewers' section is absent. Same issue as Task 6.
findings.fix: Add '## Reviewers' section noting this is a self-verifying audit task with output at logs/working/task-7/security-auditor-1.json.

findings.issue: The '## Reviewers' section is absent. Same issue as Tasks 6 and 7.
findings.fix: Add '## Reviewers' section noting this is a self-verifying audit task with output at logs/working/task-8/test-audit.md.

findings.issue: The '## Reviewers' section is absent. Same issue as tasks 6, 7, 8.
findings.fix: Add '## Reviewers' section noting this is a self-verifying QA task with output at logs/working/task-9/qa-report.md.

findings.issue: Required Skills entry is missing the markdown link to the SKILL.md file. Text reads: '/skill:test-master' with no link. All other tasks in this batch include a proper link, e.g., '[skills/test-master/SKILL.md](~/.claude/skills/test-master/SKILL.md)'.

Context Files is missing 'architecture.md' and 'project.md', which are mandatory context files per the validation checklist. Tasks 6, 7, and 8 all include architecture.md and project.md; Task 9 omits both.
findings.fix: Add links: '[architecture.md](~/.claude/skills/project-knowledge/references/architecture.md)' and '[project.md](~/.claude/skills/project-knowledge/references/project.md)' to the Context Files section.

findings.issue: Post-completion checklist has only 2 items (decisions.md entry + deviations). The template requires a third item: 'Update user-spec/tech-spec if anything changed'. Task 6 also omits this item; Task 8 omits it too.
findings.fix: Add third checklist item: '- [ ] Update user-spec/tech-spec if anything changed as a result of audit findings.'

findings.issue: Post-completion checklist has only 2 items, missing the spec-update item. Same as Task 7.
findings.fix: Add: '- [ ] Update user-spec/tech-spec if anything changed as a result of audit findings.'

findings.issue: Post-completion checklist has only 2 items, missing the spec-update item. Same as Tasks 6 and 7.
findings.fix: Add: '- [ ] Update user-spec/tech-spec if anything changed as a result of audit findings.'

findings.issue: architecture.md link uses a relative path '../../.claude/skills/project-knowledge/references/architecture.md' while Tasks 6, 7, and 9 use the tilde path '~/.claude/skills/project-knowledge/references/architecture.md'. Inconsistent path style across the batch.

carry_forward_check.tech_spec_ac_in_task9: All 12 tech-spec Acceptance Criteria items are present verbatim in Task 9 AC section. No carry-forward losses detected.
carry_forward_check.tech_spec_ac_in_audit_tasks: Tasks 6, 7, 8 are audit tasks — their ACs cover reviewing the implementation rather than implementing it. No carry-forward requirement applies to audit task ACs.
carry_forward_check.tdd_anchor_carry_forward: Tasks 6, 7, 8, 9 are non-code tasks (audit and QA). TDD Anchor carry-forward does not apply. All four tasks correctly omit the TDD Anchor section.

dependency_check.graph: Tasks 6, 7, 8 depend on [5] (wave 4). Task 9 depends on [6, 7, 8] (wave 5). All wave assignments are consistent with dependency ordering.
dependency_check.wave_consistency: Task 5 is wave 3 (inferred). Tasks 6, 7, 8 are wave 4 (> wave 3). Task 9 is wave 5 (> wave 4). Correct.

skills_reviewers_check.task_6: skills=[code-reviewing], reviewers=[] — matches tech-spec 'Reviewers: none'. Skill matches task type (code audit).
skills_reviewers_check.task_7: skills=[security-auditor], reviewers=[] — matches tech-spec 'Reviewers: none'. Skill matches task type (security audit).
skills_reviewers_check.task_8: skills=[test-master], reviewers=[] — matches tech-spec 'Reviewers: none'. Skill matches task type (test audit).
skills_reviewers_check.task_9: skills=[pre-deploy-qa], reviewers=[] — matches tech-spec 'Reviewers: none'. Skill matches task type (QA).
